title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Mountain Meleshevija. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is unspecified. Maleshevski mountains are located in the eastern part of the Republic of North Macedonia. The are covers the municipalities of Berovo and Pehchevo, and is characterized with the natural and cultural wealth. Two rivers cross the region, Bregalnica and Strumica. Forests covers 52% of the Maleshevija region, while pastures around 20%.

title: Interest on this VC
description: The large majority of the recorded plants are used in form of teas, and mainly for minor dysfunctions of the respiratory system, in a form of medicinal herbs. These herbs have a potential to involve local collectors , mainly individuals and families from the region of Maleshevija. With these efforts there is a potential to create employment opportunity thereby, helping in decreasing poverty and increasing empowerment of particularly women. The Maleshevski mountain offers very good condition for further development of tea herbs. Tea herbs, as NTFP, are natural, healthy and wild products with good potential in the Meleshevski mountains. Rural families in that region, are involved in such activities.

title: Challenges
description: Harvesting is often done in a non-sustainable manner, careless about the resource, one due to the lack of training, and second due to the competition among harvesters to get quantity over quality. Buyout values quantity and rarely quality.A significant portion of study participants raised concerns regarding the possibility of over exploitation of a few species due to collecting practices serving both local and outside (pharmaceutical) markets. The stakeholders are disorganized, though some efforts of organization exist. Overall the type of challenge faced by this VC is Current and Predicted. This VC is classified as Traditional and Innovative.
